extract: Sinistcha (Japanese: ヤバソチャ Yabasocha) is a dual-type Grass/Ghost Pokémon introduced during Generation IX, in The Teal Mask. It evolves from Poltchageist when exposed to an Unremarkable Teacup or a Masterpiece Teacup, depending on Poltchageist's form. Sinistcha's form is determined by the form it was as a Poltchageist. Unremarkable Form Sinistcha (which lacks a stamp of authenticity) evolves from Counterfeit Form Poltchageist using an Unremarkable Teacup. Masterpiece Form Sinistcha (which has a stamp of authenticity) evolves from Artisan Form Poltchageist using a Masterpiece Teacup. It bears a close resemblance to Polteageist; however, the two are separate species.
